calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Continued To Jun-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA"). Beth Kramer for Jessica Lo (Guardian for Heir).

Ms. Kramer referred to probate codes 12530 and 12540(a), and stated that it was her opinion that distribution should go directly the the Heir. In addition, she stated that a letter was provided from Counsel in Taiwan, but that Counsel was not comfortable signing a declaration. Mr. Ferdon stated that the franchise tax certificate had not been filed as he had not received it, that the fees requested were not extraordinary fees and that they were additional compensation as the SFPA was called into the matter because of the tax consequences. The matter was continued to June 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court would like to see points and authorities from Ms. Kramer.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
